name: image_search
description: Searches the web for images matching a query with filters for size, color, type, and safe search. Returns image URLs, thumbnails, dimensions, and source page metadata.

query.description: The image search query describing what to find.
query.$comment: Shorter max length than web_search since image queries tend to be more concise and keyword-driven.

num_results.description: Number of image results to return.
num_results.$comment: Higher cap than web_search (50 vs 20) since image grid UIs typically display more results per page.

size.description: Filter results by approximate image size category.
size.$comment: Categorical sizes rather than pixel dimensions to abstract backend-specific size classifications.

color.description: Optional color filter to find images that predominantly feature a specific color. Use color names (e.g., 'red', 'blue', 'black') or 'monochrome' for grayscale.
color.$comment: Free-form string to allow named colors; backend normalizes to supported color filters.

type.description: Filter by image type or content category.
type.$comment: Enum covers the primary distinct image format categories useful for design and research workflows.

safe_search.description: Whether to apply safe search filtering to exclude explicit or adult image content.
safe_search.$comment: Always defaults to true. Image safe search is especially important given visual content risks.
